violations.text: Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (juice, oat milk) in the home delivery refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025
Caulking located on the 3 bay sink in the meat area was not in good repair, observed torn and incomplete seal. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. 1. Walk-In Cooler Fans/Ventilation (Deli, Produce, Meat) 2. Knife Rack (seafood) PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025

The following were observed in poor repair. 1. Missing wall tiles (bakery area, seafood area) 2. Hole/dent in wall, observed exposed wood (meat area) 3. Missing ceiling tile (home delivery area) 4. Wall observed with chipping paint (dry storage area) The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/23/2025
Grey water was observed stagnant in receiving area. Liquid wastes to be drained to disposal per law. Specific zoned area closed during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2023
